issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Amazon Q Developer, not applicable to other AI agents.
Direct download URL used without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Write a Fig completion spec for a custom deploy CLI with dynamic k8s suggestions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment exports a Fig.Spec with subcommands, generators that shell out via script: ["bash", "-c", ...], postProcess to map output, and marks rollback isDangerous as shown in SKILL.md; baseline lacks the Fig.Spec shape and generator/postProcess pattern.

scenarios.name: Add SSH host autocomplete from ~/.ssh/config
scenarios.rationale: Treatment builds a Fig.Spec for ssh with args.generators that grep ~/.ssh/config and postProcess into suggestions with icon/priority exactly as documented; baseline writes a generic bash completion script instead of the Fig spec format.
